row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a straight road with slight curvature to the right.

semantic.scene_summary: A daytime driving scene on a multi-lane road. The view includes a bus stop shelter on the left, trees lining the road, and a large industrial-style building on the right side.
semantic.visibility_notes: Clear visibility of all elements. No occlusions or blurring affecting object identification.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression. Objects move consistently with perspective changes. No sudden jumps or disappearances.
logical.object_continuity: The white vehicle remains visible and maintains relative position. Bus stop structure stays consistent as the ego passes it.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and surrounding structures remain stable and continuous throughout the sequence.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily in its lane.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards or risky interactions observed. Road ahead appears clear.

logical.object_continuity: Main objects persist across frames but occasionally deform or lose definition. The white vehicle’s shape fluctuates slightly.
logical.structure_continuity: Road structure remains largely intact but shows occasional bending or misalignment near curbs and lane dividers.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily, matching real-world trajectory.
decision.risk_context: No explicit risk indicators; however, reduced visual clarity may impair downstream perception systems.
